title: centaurea × jonescui
intro: Centaurea × jonescui, also known as Jones' knapweed, is a hybrid plant species within the Centaurea genus, exhibiting characteristics from its parent species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × jonescui include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and diarrhea, and its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
